title: geranium mascatense var. camerunense
intro: Geranium mascatense var. camerunense, also known as Mountain geranium or Cameroon geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Geranium mascatense var. camerunense can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
